pages.title: Dyeing
pages.text: Dyeing any item is not that simple, for that you will have to craft a Dyeing Barrel. Some items only accept one Bottled Dye, while others, that have multiple parts, can accept two. Stencils allow you to use 2 separate dyes on single item/side.

pages.title: Stencils
pages.text: Stencils is a way to customize your clothing even more! They are crafted from base stencil put into a Stonecutter
